steps.title: Read the line of best fit
steps.content: The question asks for the value predicted by the line of best fit, not the actual data point. At $x=32$, read vertically up to the fitted line.

steps.title: Estimate the y-value
steps.content: The fitted line is between $y=2$ and $y=3$ when $x=32$.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The only choice between $2$ and $3$ is $2.4$, so C is correct.
